caption: The video depicts a medical simulation scenario, likely part of a training exercise for healthcare professionals. In the scene, a patient is lying on a hospital bed, covered with a blanket featuring moon and star patterns. A healthcare provider wearing blue scrubs, a stethoscope, and gloves is actively examining the patient, possibly checking their vital signs or listening to their heart and lungs. Another individual, also in medical attire, stands nearby, observing the process. The setting appears to be a hospital room, equipped with medical furniture and supplies. The text "Day 1" and "Sim Week" suggests this is part of a structured training program aimed at enhancing clinical skills and patient care practices. The atmosphere is focused and professional, emphasizing the importance of proper medical procedures and teamwork.
